name: New England Journal of Medicine
description: Premier general medical journal publishing original research, review articles, and clinical practice guidelines across all medical specialties. High impact factor, rigorous peer review, emphasis on novel findings with significant clinical implications.

name: The Lancet
description: Leading global medical journal publishing original research, reviews, and commentary on clinical medicine, global health, and health policy. Strong focus on public health impact and international health issues.

name: JAMA - Journal of the American Medical Association
description: High-impact general medical journal publishing original investigations, reviews, and clinical guidelines. Strong emphasis on study methodology and reporting standards.

name: The BMJ (British Medical Journal)
description: Major international general medical journal with open access model. Strong focus on research integrity, transparent reporting, and patient involvement in research.

name: Annals of Internal Medicine
description: Premier internal medicine journal publishing original research, systematic reviews, clinical guidelines, and practice-changing research. Strong methodology requirements.

name: Pediatrics
description: Official journal of the American Academy of Pediatrics. Publishes original research, clinical guidelines, and policy statements on pediatric health. Wide scope covering all pediatric subspecialties.

name: The Journal of Pediatrics
description: Major pediatric journal publishing clinical research across all pediatric subspecialties. Focus on clinically relevant research with practical applications.

name: Archives of Disease in Childhood
description: Leading pediatric journal focusing on fetal and neonatal medicine, child health, adolescent medicine. Strong tradition in UK and European pediatric research.

name: Annals of Surgery
description: Oldest surgical journal, publishing original research on all aspects of surgical science. Emphasis on outcomes research, surgical technique, and clinical trials.

name: JAMA Surgery
description: High-impact surgical journal of the AMA network. Publishes clinical research, systematic reviews, and innovative surgical techniques across all surgical specialties.

name: British Journal of Surgery
description: Major European surgical journal with international scope. Strong focus on evidence-based surgery, randomized trials, and systematic reviews.

name: Journal of Pediatric Surgery
description: Premier journal dedicated to pediatric surgery. Covers all aspects of surgical care in infants, children, and adolescents including trauma, oncology, and congenital anomalies.

name: Pediatric Surgery International
description: International pediatric surgery journal publishing original research, case reports, and reviews on surgical conditions in children.

name: Circulation
description: Leading cardiovascular journal publishing basic, translational, and clinical research. Strong emphasis on novel findings in cardiovascular disease and stroke.

name: Journal of the American College of Cardiology
description: Official journal of the ACC, publishing clinical research, guidelines, and state-of-the-art reviews in cardiovascular medicine.

name: Gastroenterology
description: Top-tier gastroenterology journal publishing original research in digestive diseases, hepatology, and nutrition.

name: Radiology
description: Premier radiology journal publishing research on all imaging modalities. Strong emphasis on diagnostic accuracy studies and imaging innovations.

name: Pediatric Radiology
description: Official journal of the European Society of Paediatric Radiology. Covers all aspects of diagnostic imaging in children.

name: American Journal of Roentgenology
description: General radiology journal with broad scope covering diagnostic imaging, interventional radiology, and nuclear medicine.

name: PLOS Medicine
description: Open access medical journal publishing research with broad public health implications. Strong focus on global health and health policy.

name: Cochrane Database of Systematic Reviews
description: Gold standard database for systematic reviews and meta-analyses. Rigorous methodology requirements following Cochrane Handbook.

name: World Journal of Surgery
description: International surgical journal with global perspective. Covers general surgery and all surgical subspecialties with focus on international collaboration.

name: European Journal of Pediatric Surgery
description: Official journal of European and Asian pediatric surgical associations. Publishes original research, case reports, and technical innovations.

name: Journal of Laparoendoscopic & Advanced Surgical Techniques
description: Dedicated to minimally invasive surgical techniques. Covers laparoscopic, endoscopic, and robotic surgery across all specialties.

name: Surgical Endoscopy
description: Official journal of SAGES and EAES. Leading journal for minimally invasive surgery and endoscopic techniques.

name: Vietnam Medical Journal
description: National medical journal of Vietnam publishing research in Vietnamese and English. Covers all medical specialties with focus on Vietnamese healthcare context.

name: Journal of Medicine and Pharmacy
publisher: Hue University of Medicine and Pharmacy
description: Academic medical journal from Hue University. Publishes clinical and basic research with Vietnamese healthcare relevance.

name: Tap chi Nhi khoa (Journal of Pediatrics)
description: National pediatric journal of Vietnam. Publishes research on child health, pediatric diseases, and public health issues affecting Vietnamese children.

name: Tap chi Ngoai khoa Viet Nam
description: National surgical journal of Vietnam. Covers all surgical specialties with emphasis on surgical care in Vietnamese healthcare settings.

name: Y Hoc TP Ho Chi Minh
publisher: Ho Chi Minh City Medical Association
description: Regional medical journal covering clinical research from southern Vietnam. Wide scope including all medical and surgical specialties.
